slides.title: Topic 1 — Re-alignment: FP-034 cross-species residue mapping
slides.subtitle: 1WDW-B (Pf, 385 aa) vs 3CEP-B (St, 393 aa) differ by +5 N-terminal residues

leftBox.heading: Naive path (what we had)
leftBox.body:
Resid-number alignment: 97 ↔ 97
112 Cα identity: 6.2 %
O↔C endpoint RMSD: 10.89 Å
⟨MSD⟩ along path: 0.606 Å²
λ from ⟨MSD⟩: 3.80 Å⁻²
→ path literally mixed two residue sets

rightBox.heading: Sequence-aligned path (FP-034 fix)
rightBox.body:
Needleman-Wunsch: uniform +5 offset
112 Cα mapped to true homologs
Identity: 59.0 %  (9.5× better)
O↔C RMSD: 2.115 Å  (5.1× tighter)
⟨MSD⟩: 0.0228 Å²  (26.6× smaller)
λ: 100.79 Å⁻²  (Branduardi compliant)

bullets.text: How the bug was silent for 3 weeks

bullets: generate_path_cv.py line 182 COMPUTED a NW alignment · line 670 NEVER CONSUMED it
Code ran clean, produced a usable-looking path.pdb — error only surfaced downstream as sampling failure
(a) My NW · (b) Codex NW (score 286, identity 59.033 %, offset +5) · (c) endpoint round-trip · (d) 4 PC crystals projection
slides.footer: Slide 2 / 10  ·  Topic 1 (1/2)  ·  FP-034 root cause + verification

slides.title: Topic 1 — 数值对比 + 生物学 sanity
slides.subtitle: Numbers show the fix works; PC crystals now sit mid-path

bullets.text: Key biological sanity — 3 βPC crystals now sit s=5.4–9.5

bullets: On naive path all three collapsed to s ≈ 1.07 (indistinguishable from O)
Corrected path exposes partial-closure geometry — meaningful for Aex1 reactive state downstream

slides.title: Topic 1 — 视觉 proof + start.gro s=7 的来历
slides.subtitle: Same start.gro, same Miguel params  ·  naive path 塌到 s<2  ·  corrected path 铺开 s=1-12
bullets: 左: baseline 45324928 (naive path, 16 ns) COLVAR 的 (s, z) 2D 密度 KDE
右: pilot 45515869 (corrected path, 8 ns) 同样的 2D 密度 KDE
两侧用同一色标 · start.gro (t=0) 位置用 ★ 标出
脚本: reports/figures/plot_sz_distribution.py (Python matplotlib gaussian_kde)

bullets.text: start.gro 投到 s=7.09 不是 bug —— 是 linear-interp path 的已知性质

bullets: Kabsch 直接测量: vs 1WDW 1.59 Å · vs 3CEP 1.76 Å · vs MODEL 7 1.30 Å
start.gro 离每个 MODEL 都很近 (差距只有 0.3-0.5 Å), 没有绝对的 'nearest'
Branduardi soft-min: s = Σ i·exp(-λ·MSD_i) / Σ exp(-λ·MSD_i), 几乎等距时自然加权到中段
所以 s=7 只是几何软平均伪影, 不是 'Ain 真的在 PC basin' 的 biology claim
z=1.68 Å² (mean_z=1.53) 佐证: walker 也不在 path 上, 是 off-path 投影
slides.footer: Slide 4 / 11  ·  Topic 1 (3/3)  ·  visual proof + start.gro soft-min 解释

slides.title: Topic 2 — Miguel author parameter contract
slides.subtitle: First-author Miguel Maria-Solano email 2026-04-23 · verbatim METAD parameters
slides.code:
# Miguel's PLUMED contract (verbatim, 2026-04-23 email reply)
UNITS         LENGTH=A  ENERGY=kcal/mol     # NOT nm / kJ (fixes FP-032)
METAD ARG=path.sss  PACE=500                # MULTIPLE_WALKERS protocol
  HEIGHT         0.15 kcal/mol              # primary (0.3 = aggressive fallback)
  BIASFACTOR     10                         # primary (15 = aggressive fallback)
  SIGMA          ADAPTIVE=DIFF              # NOT GEOM (fixes FP-031)
  WALKERS_N      10                         # shared HILLS, 10 independent walkers
  TEMP           350                        # thermophilic P. furiosus
  LAMBDA         80  (A^-2)                 # self-consistent on HIS path; re-derive per-path
UPPER_WALLS ARG=path.zzz  AT=2.5  KAPPA=500  # cap off-path excursion

bullets.text: What changed vs our prior attempts (and why each matters)

bullets: ADAPTIVE = DIFF (not GEOM) — FP-031: GEOM projects σ onto wrong axis near path endpoints
UNITS = A / kcal (not nm / kJ) — FP-032: SIGMA bookkeeping was off by unit conversion
WALKERS_N = 10 with HEIGHT=0.15, BF=10 is the PRIMARY contract (aggressive 0.3/15 is fallback only)
λ=80 is self-consistent on Miguel's path, NOT a universal constant · ours is 100.79 (ratio 1.26×, same regime)

bullets.text: Why this is the single most important external input this week

bullets: All earlier parameter debates (probe_sweep, wall4, piecewise-λ) terminated against this contract
plumed_template.dat + ladder.yaml now code this as the frozen spec (YAML = source of truth)

s=7 is linear-interp soft-min artifact

Not 'clean PC basin found'

Is: coord system corrected, exploration opened

slides.title: Topic 4 — 10-walker seeding 的故事: v1 → v2 → v3 (pending)
slides.subtitle: Two attempts both unusable  ·  Codex diagnosed LINCS + seed-dup  ·  v3 pipeline designed

rows: all 10 from same start.gro (cMD endpoint @ 50/100/.../500 ns)
FP-030 homogeneous start — no diversity, shared-HILLS degenerate
pick pilot COLVAR frame with target_s ∈ {1..10} + min z
LINCS blow-up atoms 4463-4465 + seed-dup (w0=w1 at s=1.99, w5=w6 at s=6.60)
same as v2 + EM+NVT settle + unique-frame guard
Codex root cause: seed .gro from pilot xtc carries biased-MetaD geometry stress; LINCS fails without relaxation

bullets: Step 1 · EM 1000 steps, emtol=1000 kJ/mol/nm  (fix bad contacts)
Step 2 · NVT 100 ps at 350 K, PLUMED OFF, gen_vel=yes  (equilibrate + regenerate velocities)
Step 3 · Production MetaD from nvt.cpt, PLUMED ON, shared HILLS_DIR
unique-frame guard (no duplicate seed IDs)  ·  std(seed_s) > 2.0 (diversity gate)  ·  velocity-presence check in start.gro

slides.title: Topic 5 — ML-layer future (audit result + v2.0 pivot)
slides.subtitle: External 2024-2026 prior art audit narrowed 5 ML extensions → 1 alive + 2 merged + 2 new

leftColumn.heading: 2026-04 audit verdict (5 original extensions)
bullets: A · CRR (catalytic-readiness reward for GRPO) — WEAKENED (PocketX/ResiDPO/ProteinZero prior art)
B · PP-Prior (path-CV energy-guided diffusion) — WEAKENED (Enhanced Diffusion Sampling 2602.16634)
C · LBP (learned bias potential) — DEAD (NN-VES / Deep-TICA / OPES+mlcolvar existing)
D · TCR (FES-matching training loss) — DEAD-ish (Thermodynamic Interpolation JCTC 2024)
E · MNG (Memory Necessity Gate) — ALIVE / LEAD (MEMnets is CV discovery, not runtime gate)
Meta: 'cartridge itself is likely more novel than any individual ML layer on top'

rightColumn.heading: v1.2 → v2.0 pivot + 2026-05-01 hard gate
bullets: v1.2 framing (PM-ratified 2026-04-22): 'cartridge owner' not 'replicator'
v2.0 sharpen: F0 PathGate evaluator = concrete deliverable for Yu/Amin/Raswanth
MNG-lead: lag-stratified Markov-vs-qMSM runtime trigger for MetaD rescue
New F · PLP-aware reactive PATHMSD (K82-PLP Schiff-base, Dunathan angle)
New G · Generative-model physics-consistency audit (pip-installable wrapper)
Hard gate 2026-05-01: if WT FES has no O/PC/C basins + no block CI + no PC crystal 2D projection → all ML layers SUSPEND
If gate passes: D2 API freezes, D3 demo on real cartridge, Aex1 variant FES next

slides.title: Summary · Q & A
slides.subtitle: What I claim this week, what I DON'T claim, what's next
bullets: Path CV fixed (FP-034 NW +5 offset) — 4-layer independent verification
Miguel author contract locked (ADAPTIVE=DIFF, units A/kcal, λ=100.79 self-consistent 1.26× vs 80)
Corrected path exposes s=1–12 region in pilot (baseline stuck at s<1.9)
FailurePatterns.md grew 3 new entries (FP-031, FP-032, FP-034) — reusable for future variants
NOT '500× speedup' — coord rescaling, not genuine MetaD efficiency
NOT 'start.gro is Ain in PC basin' — s=7.09 is off-path soft-min artifact (z=1.68)
NOT 'barrier crossed cleanly' — max_s=12.87 is single transient, not sustained
NOT 'FES converged' — need 10-walker production first
v3 10-walker with EM+NVT settle → FES with PC crystals projected
D2 API spec + D3 lab-facing demo this week
2026-05-01 hard gate: pass or suspend ML-layer extensions
Cross-species PATH-CV construction MUST gate on sequence identity > 50 % — hard assertion added to all future path-builder scripts
